mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_txn_leasing_offer (company_id, prospect_id, unit_id, offer_no, base_amount, discount_amount, final_amount, special_terms, status, approval_required, created_by) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{prospectId}, #{unitId}, #{offerNo}, #{baseAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{finalAmount}, #{specialTerms}, #{status}, #{approvalRequired}, #{createdBy}) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_leasing_offer WHERE prospect_id = #{prospectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_offer SET company_id = #{companyId}, unit_id = #{unitId}, base_amount = #{baseAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, final_amount = #{finalAmount}, special_terms = #{specialTerms}, status = #{status}, approval_required = #{approvalRequired}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_offer SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
